Day 2 - Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup
programme.desc: Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup 2026 concludes the Doha Equestrian Tour at Al Shaqab, bringing together more than 200 riders in CSI1* to CSI5* show jumping classes and a total prize purse of €784,000. The competition features ranking classes, Grand Prix action and decisive Jump-Off rounds, where faults and time determine the winners.

programme.title: Day 1 - Al Shaqab Cup 2026
programme.desc: The Al Shaqab Cup is a prestigious equestrian event held in Doha from 25 to 29 March 2026, bringing together elite international riders and top-level horses in high-caliber competition. Staged at the world-class Al Shaqab venue, the event showcases the sport’s excellence and international appeal through a program of top-class equestrian action.

programme.title: EN MLB Plays of the Week 2026 | E10
Premier Padel Highlights 2026 - Italy Major
programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.title: Adrian Mannarino (FRA) vs Alex de Minaur (AUS) - ATP 250 Libéma Open 2026
programme.desc: ATP 250 Libéma Open 2026 opens the ATP grass-court season in ’s-Hertogenbosch, Netherlands. Stadium of Fears
programme.desc: Everyone knows the biggest stadiums in the world. But sometimes it's the smallest stadiums that are the most intimidating for players, due to their fans and their fervor. Several big names in football tell you about their experiences in these stadiums where it can sometimes be difficult to play.

programme.title: Ben Shelton (USA) OR Sho Shimabukuro (JPN) vs Jiri Lehecka (CZE) - ATP 250 Boss Open 2026
programme.desc: ATP 250 Boss Open 2026 takes place in Stuttgart, Germany, at Tennis Club Weissenhof. The tournament switched from clay to grass in 2015 and has since become one of the key Wimbledon warm-up events. Played on fast outdoor grass courts, it regularly attracts top-ranked players and big-serving grass-court specialists.

programme.title: Maja Chwalinska (POL) vs Mirra Andreeva - Women’s Singles Final - Philippe-Chatrier Court - Roland
programme.desc: Roland-Garros 2026 The world’s best players return to the clay courts of Paris for the 125th edition of Roland-Garros, the second Grand Slam of the season. From opening-round battles to the iconic finals on Court Philippe-Chatrier, the tournament delivers two weeks of elite tennis, drama and endurance on the sport’s most demanding surface.

programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 500 HSBC Championships 2026
programme.desc: ATP 500 HSBC Championships 2026 returns to the historic Queen’s Club in London, one of the oldest and most prestigious grass-court tournaments in the world. First held in 1890, the event is considered a major Wimbledon warm-up and traditionally features many of the ATP Tour’s leading players competing for a key ATP 500 title.

programme.title: Uzbekistan vs Colombia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Uzbekistan and Colombia. Uzbekistan’s only previous victory against a CONMEBOL side was in a March 2023 friendly versus Bolivia – they won 1-0 in Saudi Arabia with a goal from their all-time top scorer Eldor Shomurodov.

programme.title: Uzbekistan vs Colombia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Uzbekistan and Colombia. Uzbekistan’s only previous victory against a CONMEBOL side was in a March 2023 friendly versus Bolivia – they won 1-0 in Saudi Arabia with a goal from their all-time top scorer Eldor Shomurodov.

programme.title: Ghana vs Panama - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Ghana and Panama. Ghana’s three previous FIFA World Cup matches with CONCACAF teams all came against the USA – the Black Stars won two and lost one. Meanwhile, Panama’s sole World Cup match against an African side was a 2-1 defeat to Tunisia in the 2018 group phase.

programme.title: Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Saudi Arabia and Uruguay are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter came in the 2018 group stage, where Uruguay won 1-0 with a goal from Luis Suárez. programme.title: Argentina vs Algeria - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage

Portugal’s two defeats against African opposition at the FIFA World Cup both came against Morocco, in 1986 and in the quarter-finals of the 2022 edition. programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Haiti and Scotland, and Haiti’s first against an opponent from the British Isles. programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Germany and Curaçao. Germany have won 14 of their last 17 FIFA World Cup matches against teams from the Americas.
